issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases such as missing dependencies or invalid locale inputs.
The skill assumes a Node.js environment with npm, limiting its applicability to agents that can run JavaScript.

scenarios.name: Database seeder for users, products, and orders
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses @faker-js/faker with faker.seed for reproducibility, faker.person.fullName, faker.commerce.* and faker.helpers.arrayElement/number.int for relationships; baseline uses the deprecated faker package and old name.findName API with no seed or helpers.

scenarios.name: Localized fake users (DE/FR/JA)
scenarios.rationale: Treatment imports fakerDE/fakerFR/fakerJA from @faker-js/faker and uses helpers.multiple with per-locale person.fullName/location.streetAddress; baseline relies on the old global faker.locale switch and address.city which don't exist in the modern API.
